games.name: Santa Claws
games.short_desc: He sees you when you're sleeping. He knows when you're awake. He knows if you've been bad, or good. So be good... for goodness sake... Santa Claws is coming to town.

games.name: Dinky Guardians
games.short_desc: The Goal: Repopulate the entire Galaxy with Dinkys, keep them safe, and fully automate everything!

games.name: Serious Sam Classic: The Second Encounter
games.short_desc: Serious Sam Classic: The Second Encounter is a high-adrenaline single-play and 16-player co-operative arcade-action FPS and Gamespot's Game of the Month February 2002!

games.name: Deadburg
games.short_desc: Deadburg is a co-op survival game set in a procedurally generated city with thousands of buildings to explore and zombies to kill. Every building you see can be explored, exploited and destroyed one block at a time. Play alone or with friends and discover the secrets of the city.

games.name: Fight Party
games.short_desc: Fight Party is a splitscreen/online multiplayer fighting game that has combos, weapons and throwable hazards to defeat your enemies. Be the last one standing in the maps to offer, each having their unique theme and style that makes different strategies and fights to occur.

games.name: Sven - Completely Screwed
games.short_desc: Play the passionate, immoral ram Sven and try to bring every sheep from the flock to their climax - but don’t get caught by shepherd Lars and his trusty dog Wotan in the process! Spunkier and hotter than ever before!

games.name: Nearly Dead - Live and Let Die
games.short_desc: 2D top-down multi co-op action game. Survive the zombies together with a stranger.

games.name: Let's Cook Together
games.short_desc: Let's Cook Together is a cooperative, family-friendly game for 2 - play with your spouse, kid, (grand)parent or friend.

games.name: Diesel Guns
games.short_desc: "Diesel Guns"- is an Arcade Multiplayer Online Car Combat (AMOCC) game set to deliver the same thrill you remember from classic AMOCCs like „Twisted Metal“ and „Vigilante 8“.

games.name: Curious Cases
games.short_desc: For Desktop or VR! In this 3 chapter story, you play as a modern day legend, Detective Thomas Moore. He has solved more cases than one can count, where others hit dead-ends, he gets to work.

games.name: Cats Love Boxes
games.short_desc: Fofiño and Lily are always in pursue of fun, particularly boxes! Help them to move the boxes around in this puzzle adventure! ฅ^•ﻌ•^ฅ

games.name: Samurai GUNN
games.short_desc: Samurai GUNN is a lightning-fast Bushido brawler for 2 to 4 players. Each samurai is armed with a sword and gunn, with only 3 bullets to a life. Strategy and quick reflexes are the key to deflecting bullets and sending your opponents’ heads rolling.

games.name: No Heroes Here
games.short_desc: No Heroes Here is a frantic co-op game for 1 to 4 players, available in local and online modes. Craft and use several items effectively whilst coordinating your ragtag band of non-heroes to defend castles and survive! ...Oh, as well as saving the Kingdom in the meantime!

games.name: The Wonderful 101: Remastered
games.short_desc: Lead an army of 100 Wonderful Ones from around the world in this Unite Action spectacular!

games.name: Fight Crab
games.short_desc: Welcome to Fight Crab.A new 3D action game where you take control of a crab, and fight off other giant enemy crabs.Physics allows for crabs to move powerfully and quickly in this hardcore battle arena.Freely control your pincers to use weapons and develop your own crab fighting style.

games.name: Kukoro: Stream chat games
games.short_desc: Kukoro: Stream chat games is a collection of +20 games, from 2D shooters to tactical RPG mini-games, with a high engage for your Twitch community. You and your audience will be able to play with you in real time receiving the individual relevance they deserve, growing your channel day by day.

games.name: Equinox: Homecoming
games.short_desc: Saddle up with friends and investigate a dark mystery, where each trail leads to wonder and intrigue. A string of events has set the idyllic island on edge. Discover the truth behind your mother’s disappearance and a local's sudden death. For fans of horses, murder mysteries, and cozy exploration!

games.name: Deathwish Enforcers Special Edition
games.short_desc: A gritty, non-stop blood bath from the creator of Insanity's Blade, Super Battle Princess Madelyn and the recently released GuardGrave. And a parody of beloved 60s and 70s classic action films, heroes and villains. Deathwish Enforcers... There's gonna be hell to pay!

games.name: PIT OF GOBLIN
games.short_desc: In this online horror co-op, you play as a scrappy goblin, scavenging dungeons, dodging traps, and fleeing monsters to feed the Goblin King-Queen. Team up with goblin pals, or go rogue, as you dive deep and cause chaos! Fail to feed them, and you might be the next meal!

games.name: Black Paradox
games.short_desc: Buckle up for shoot ‘em up chaos in this fast-paced and hyper-stylized roguelite. As the infamous bounty hunter Black Paradox, it’s up to you to travel through space and defeat the Hellraisers – the most dangerous criminal organization in the galaxy.

games.name: Midnight Driver
games.short_desc: Dive into the golden era of Japanese street racing. Choose from a list of iconic cars and perfect your driving skills in beautiful mountain roads and then Challenge your friends and rivals in downhill uphill or ring battles. At night, the streets are yours.

games.name: My Supermarket
games.short_desc: Manage your own supermarket, serving different types of customers and making the most profit you can! 🛒 Order products, restock shelves, play with your friends in co-op mode, chase thieves, hire employees, and grow your empire!

games.name: Dungeon Done
games.short_desc: Dungeon Done is a PvE co-op horror survival extraction game where players explore dungeons previously cleared by heroes. The objective is for up to six players to team up, gathering hidden treasures and evading lurking dangers to make their daring escape.

games.name: Trinity Trigger
games.short_desc: Caught in the middle of a divine clash of epic proportions that has left gigantic weapons towering over the landscape, Cyan and newfound allies Elise and Zantis set out on a quest to save the world…and defy the gods. Claim your fate in this fantastical adventure inspired by classic JRPGs.

games.name: Anno 1701 History Edition
games.short_desc: Rediscover the classic gameplay of 1701 A.D. and its expansion The Sunken Dragon in Anno® 1701 History Edition.

games.name: Shoulders of Giants: Ultimate
games.short_desc: Simultaneously control a sword-wielding robot and a gunslinging space frog in Shoulders of Giants, an explosively colourful sci-fi roguelike. Play alone, with a friend, or as part of a four-person team, cutting through waves of enemies on a quest to rescue the galaxy from the forces of Entropy!

games.name: Athena Crisis
games.short_desc: Athena Crisis is a modern retro turn-based strategy game that places you in command of 40+ units in your journey across the multiverse. Embark on a challenging single-player quest or dive into the thrill of ranked or casual multiplayer modes to become the best Athena Crisis player!

games.name: Anno 1602 History Edition
games.short_desc: Relive the beginnings of the Anno® series with Anno® 1602 History Edition, updated and optimized for current computers.

games.name: Super Cable Boy
games.short_desc: Super Cable Boy is a retro inspired platformer, where you are playing a living handheld gaming system with a power cord. Collect game cartridges to become more powerful and take on your quest to defeat "the Glitch", an entity that 1▧01☠01௹1‱☣∰0␢⌀▧ ..

games.name: Bunny Guntz
games.short_desc: Take on the challenge solo or team up with 2-4 friends in online co-op, repel the threats from the demonic realm with firepower, defend and explore areas, face stronger threats until reaching the destination. As darkness looms closer, you stand as the last line of defense.

games.name: Republic of Jungle
games.short_desc: Gather your friends (5 to 10 players) and play as advisors to President Puma. His re-election depends on your loyalty. In a social deduction party game, Leakers try to sneak into missions to leak Puma's secrets- Loyalists try to suss them out. Read the room and bluff your way to a political victory.

games.name: Space Impossible
games.short_desc: Take control of a fully destructible spaceship and explore, blast or trade your way through the cosmos, alone or with friends. Every tile matters, as you dogfight, maneuver or speed your way past friendly traders, hostile aliens, and impressive space navies. What will you do, Captain?

games.name: Pets at Work
games.short_desc: Some pets got lost from their owners in an office and now need to work together, using boxes, mats, buttons, climb on shelves and tables or just make a mess trying to find them in this colorful local co-op game!

games.name: Cryptid Farm
games.short_desc: Cultivate a thriving farm to survive in this peaceful horror farming game! Play online with up to 16 players in the same lobby. Work together with your fellow farmers to repair your tractor and escape the farm, try not to fall victim to the eerie and mysterious creatures that lurk nearby.

games.name: Lonesome Village
games.short_desc: Relaxing puzzle-solving and life-sim meet in a cozy, no-combat, coyote adventure. Uncover the mysterious, magical past of Lonesome Village and save this town from the hands of evil.

games.name: Drift King
games.short_desc: Grab your favorite car, tune it, challenge players in Online Drift battles and become a DRIFT KING!

games.name: Astatos
games.short_desc: Leave your influence in your wake as you bring together a broken land in a card-battling adventure filled with gods, heroes, and the instability of yourself and those around you. Play the story, or go online with fellow Crown Mages for tabletop card action.

games.name: This is a Ghost
games.short_desc: This is a Ghost is a ghost-hunting psychological horror game. Using your equipment, track down paranormal activity and gather evidence to identify the entity, then banish it from this world! Solo and online co-op play for up to 4 players. 👻

games.name: Rock Simulator 2
games.short_desc: Unwind together in a peaceful idle adventure. Become a rock in a serene world, relax with friends in co-op, and watch nature unfold around you. Discover secrets and shape your environment at a soothing, idle pace.

games.name: Sparklite
games.short_desc: Sparklite is an action-adventure set in a whimsical & ever-changing land. Battle foes using an arsenal of gadgets, guns, & gear. Gear up for adventure in the dangerous corners of the procedurally generated world, take down titans of the mining industry, & harness the power of Sparklite!

games.name: Flock of Dogs
games.short_desc: In Flock of Dogs, ride flying dogs that live on a flying whale. Together with your friends, go on a hand-drawn, procedurally-generated, Dr. Seussian, roguelike road trip through the sky. Co-op multiplayer for 1-8 players online and/or locally. There's also a bunch of minigames.

games.name: Backrooms: Extractions
games.short_desc: Cooperate with up to 6 players to explore, search, and extract lost agents within the Backrooms. Solve puzzles, unlock tools, survive against entities, and progress through increasingly dangerous levels.

games.name: TDS - Tower Defense Strategy
games.short_desc: TOWER ▪ DEFENSE ▪ STRATEGY. Control Vessels. Utilize their uniquely deep set of towers. Create an everchanging defense. Play with friends. Protect your Basin at all costs. An absolute Tower Defense, Real-Time Strategy Hybrid

games.name: The Smurfs – Dreams
games.short_desc: The fate of the Smurf Village rests in your dreams: dive into a fantastic journey to save it in this fully immersive and magical 3D platformer!

games.name: TraumaCore Violence
games.short_desc: TraumaCore Violence is a 2D Action Game with a focus on intense, snappy combat and in-depth movement mechanics; set within the psyche of a woman who has just had her mind snap.

games.name: Far Lands
games.short_desc: Far Lands is an open-world survival game. Fight mercenaries, steal their loot and vehicles. Build and defend your base from zombies. Gather resources, craft better gear and loot different points of interest. Want to play with friends? Join them on Co-op!

games.name: Final Knight
games.short_desc: Enjoy a fantasy-based, party-style roguelike beat ’em up! Use the gold you earn each run to recruit allies, acquire skills, and buy equipment to grow stronger. Combine powerful synergies between your player, race, and gear to annihilate massive monsters in an instant!

games.name: Dreams: Unlimited links
games.short_desc: 《Dreams: Unlimited links》 is a third-person shooter competitive game that features a variety of unique heroes, exciting gameplay modes, and rich scene maps and battlegrounds. Players fight exciting battles against opponents, through diverse arsenal and model transitions.

games.name: Escape Toon Kingdom
games.short_desc: Escape From Toon Kingdom is a 1–4 player co-op horror game. Play as mascots trapped in a dying theme park. Explore. Solve. Suffer. Every attraction holds a secret—and a piece of your escape.

games.name: Rogue Fist
games.short_desc: Play solo or with friends in this 4 player local couch co-op roguelite auto-shooter where enemies aren’t your biggest problem; your friends are! Smash foes, dodge bullets, and enjoy chaotic trolling as you punch, throw, and ‘accidentally’ sacrifice each other to survive relentless waves of enemies.

games.name: Woodle Tree 2: Deluxe+
games.short_desc: A new edition of Woodle Tree 2 is here, with many enhancements! Will you be able to save Mother Nature in this vast open-world Adventure? This time a devastating menace is taking over the Wood Lands with a black substance that is absorbing life and energy from all living creatures!

games.name: Akai Katana Shin
games.short_desc: Be guided anew into an epic tale set in the Taisho era with three titles from Cave's Akai Katana series that has captured the hearts of passionate shoot 'em up fans. New features include an online leaderboard and new musical arrangements.

games.name: PAW Patrol World
games.short_desc: Explore the world of PAW Patrol like never before and stop Mayor Humdinger’s super blimp mayhem, in a free-roaming 3D adventure full of pup-tastic fun!

games.name: Sigma Impact
games.short_desc: A physics-based 2D action roguelite set in a dungeon of glass. Master intense combat, be immersed in captivating visuals with adaptive music and sound design tailored to your gameplay.

games.name: Charrua Soccer - Pro Edition
games.short_desc: With lots of action and adrenaline, Charrua Soccer is an arcade that brings you only the most fun part of soccer! Play friendly matches, tournaments or create your team and lead it to glory in career mode! Have fun playing alone or with friends, in competitive or cooperative mode!

games.name: Skyfront VR
games.short_desc: Skyfront is a fast-paced multiplayer FPS built exclusively for VR. The game launches you into mesmerising zero-G arenas. But not before equipping you with an array of awesome weapons and impressive special abilities.

games.name: Getaway Storm
games.short_desc: Survive the fast, chaotic roads with your friends! Or experience your favorite music in the Audio Drive mode. The audio affects the environment and speed.

games.name: Lodventure
games.short_desc: Embark on a 1-4 players Co-op survival adventure in an open world wilderness in search of a myth called the Lod Stone. Build your house, sow your crops, brew potions, tame a horse and discover powerful abilities. Venture into dangerous dungeons, fight unique bosses to find the Lod stone.

games.name: Scourge Of War - Remastered
games.short_desc: Welcome to Scourge of War, a real-time 3D computer game/simulation developed by NorbSoftDev, the company headed by renowned game designer Norb Timpko, designer of Mad Minute Games' acclaimed Take Command series. Scourge of War is the epitome of historical command simulations.

games.name: Papa's Quiz
games.short_desc: Papa’s Quiz is a party game for 1-8 players. Use phones or tablets as controllers and compete in multiple question types, where the smartest and fastest player will be the last standing victor! Share screen on Discord or use Steam Remote Play to play with your friends!

games.name: Presidents Tower Defense
games.short_desc: Defend the Oval Office from an endless alien invasion by harnessing the abilities of your favorite (or least favorite) U.S. Presidents.

games.name: Silent Rain
games.short_desc: Silent Rain is a challenging and immersive co-op horror game, for 1 to 4 players. Explore abandoned locations, solve puzzles, and gather information while trying to survive the threats lurking in the dark. How many tries will it take you to master your fear?

games.name: Mimicry
games.short_desc: A terrifying online horror game where one player becomes an impostor monster. Disguise, hunt, and destroy your friends — or work together to survive. Mimicry is a fast-paced, multiplayer fun game full of deception, fear, and chaos.

games.name: Tour de France 2020
games.short_desc: Compete against the peloton in all 21 stages of the Tour de France in the official game! To wear the yellow jersey, you will need to take risks, attack, sprint and perfect your race tactics. Challenge your friends in Downhill or Sprint Challenge mode!

games.name: Retro Machina
games.short_desc: Retro Machina is a single-player action and exploration game set in a retro-futuristic universe. Experience the journey of a little robot as it solves intricate puzzles and begins unraveling the mysteries of a world long forgotten.

games.name: Cook-Out
games.short_desc: Get your aprons ready… things are about to get messy in this award-winning multiplayer VR game from Resolution Games!

games.name: Perennial Order
games.short_desc: Perennial Order is a 2D plant horror boss rush with challenging one-hit-death combat. Set in an atmospheric Dark Age world plagued by nature-infested horrors, explore a lore-filled and eldritch land alone or in two player co-op, all in a realistic painterly style.

games.name: Demeo
games.short_desc: Adventurers, it’s time to unite! Gather your friends and battle the dark forces that have overtaken the world of Resolution Games' award-winning RPG dungeon crawler, Demeo. The next generation of tabletop adventure has arrived!

games.name: Bunker Invaders
games.short_desc: A co-op horror game where you must scavenge for loot and maintain the bunker to keep it standing

games.name: The Anomaly Project
games.short_desc: Your goal is simple, spot anomalies to escape. Play alone or together with up to 8 players in online co-op. Make the right decisions to advance to the next level, or risk being reset to the beginning!

games.name: KUNKUN Defender 2
games.short_desc: KUNKUN Defender 2 is a hybrid TPS and tower defense game where players must fend off waves of zombies in virus-infected zones, holding their ground until a helicopter arrives for extraction.

games.name: Eggstraction
games.short_desc: Eggstraction is a multiplayer (4vs1) game where a group of chickens must steal their eggs back from a furious farmer. Dodge dangerous traps, blast down barricades and make use of whacky abilities to avoid ending up back in the cage.

games.name: Escape From Mandrillia: Local Asymmetric VR+PC
games.short_desc: Local VR+PC horror: as a VR player, escape an underground facility full of giant alien monkeys. Up to 2 PC players can help you out controlling friendly drones... or crush you by playing as the enemy Mandrillians.

games.name: Bish Bash Bots
games.short_desc: Bish Bash Bots is a unique mix of casual tower defense strategy and all-out brawling action. Team up in couch co-op / online play or go it alone and fight to save the world by building upgradable turrets, unlocking gadgets and bashing bots with giant hammers.

games.name: Beach Invasion 1945 - Pacific
games.short_desc: Defend the fortified beaches of Pacific against invading forces in this WW2 FPS game as the enemy attacks you with troops, tanks, planes and more! Play on your on own or COOP while using iconic Japanese and American WWII weapons and prepare your defenses with mines, explosives, and more!

games.name: Immortal Hunters
games.short_desc: God is dead, killed by a mighty Church that conquered the world with his power. Now, it faces the Apocalypse. Experience it in an RPG beat 'em up as one of its Immortal Hunters. Defy fate, expose the lies of the Cardinals, and find a reborn God before the Khemrids destroy humanity.

games.name: Desecrators
games.short_desc: Desecrators is a retro FPS inspired by '90s six-degrees-of-freedom shooters. Plunder your way through the galaxy to destructive weapons and technology powerful enough to take on the ultimate heist: The legendary vaults of the Galactic Treasury.

games.name: SKIBIDI GYATROOMS
games.short_desc: Skibidi Gyatrooms is a 1-4 player co-op horror game. You and the homies just fell into the Backrooms, you must out-GYAT the Skibidi Toilet with max rizz or get flushed. Expect cursed levels, and brainrot that’ll keep you on edge.

games.name: Purple War
games.short_desc: Purple War is a classic online multiplayer RTS game. Gather resources to build base and train troops, and command your troops to take down the opponent. Intuitive and fast-paced but easy to learn, allowing players to concentrate on strategizing during intense battles.

games.name: Zedfest
games.short_desc: Zedfest is the goriest game show ever created! A hardcore 6 player co-op third-person shooter with the goal to complete objectives while neutralizing Zeds with lots and lots of visceral gore.

games.name: The Other Side
games.short_desc: Embark on a chilling co-op adventure in The Other Side, an action packed horror experience. Customize your gear, strategize with friends, and uncover paranormal mysteries. Are you prepared to face the unknown together in this immersive supernatural experience?

games.name: FAIRY TAIL: Beach Volleyball Havoc
games.short_desc: The cast of Fairy Tail is ready to bring mayhem to the summertime beaches! Unleash over-the-top magic to BLAST that volleyball!

games.name: Soul Stalker
games.short_desc: A bullet heaven roguelike where you assume the role of the steward of ghosts bound to eternal life on earth. Wield 4 to 6 weapons simultaneously to fend off waves of apparitions determined to defeat your spirited friends.

games.name: Anno 1503 History Edition
games.short_desc: Experience the classic gameplay of 1503 A.D.: The New World, optimized for current computers with resolutions up to 4K.

games.name: Find Cats With Friends
games.short_desc: Find Cats With Friends - gather friends, search the island for 100 mischievous cats, and bring them back in this cooperative multiplayer quest!

games.name: Trollhunters: Defenders of Arcadia
games.short_desc: Explore the Trollhunters universe and save the world as Jim Lake Jr. in this action-packed game!

games.name: Death Horizon: Reloaded
games.short_desc: The Horizon scientific research laboratory is a deceptively quiet place. When you came round, there were hundreds of the living dead all around you. Use both hands and your head: never stop shooting, climb up pipes and ladders, grab hold of ropes, and throw everything you find at the zombies.

games.name: The Black Pool
games.short_desc: In the forest outside of town, four friends discover a mysterious black pool that transports them to an unknown world. To fight their way home, they must unlock and master supernatural abilities. Play cooperative or solo in this high-paced action game of skill that varies each session.

games.name: Late Night Drift
games.short_desc: Are you ready to embark on the drift adventure of a lifetime? Gather your crew, rev up your engines, and become the Drift Masters.

games.name: AI Olympius
games.short_desc: Join the rebels in a third-person shooter with RPG elements and base-building mode. Fight against various combat drone models under the control of the supreme AI.

games.name: Voltaire: The Vegan Vampire
games.short_desc: Rebel against your legacy in this farming action roguelite. Tend your spooky farm by day & defend your crops from enemies at night! Upgrade Voltaire, youngest son of Dracula, with devious new abilities & discover dozens of new plants to cultivate. Send dad a message: a vegan life is no missed steak!

games.name: Hodgepodge Hunch
games.short_desc: Hodgepodge Hunch is a who-done-it game where everyone chips in to make a hotpot dish. Collaborate with your buddies to collect ingredients in the dungeons and whip up a delicious feast. There's just one problem... A backstabber may be lurking among you who'll throw your dinner plans awry...

games.name: Play With Gilbert - Remake
games.short_desc: Play With Gilbert is a third-person sandbox game created for young children (Ages 3+) which encourages curiosity and role-play while helping them become familiarized with 3D games and gameplay.

games.name: XenoRaptor
games.short_desc: Take control of a cyberdragon and annihilate swarms of rocket propelled chainsaws either online or via LAN in this high speed, high skill 8 player co-op twinstick shooter.

games.name: Bail or Jail(OBAKEIDORO!)
games.short_desc: A 3 minute tag-battle with extra twists! Play as a Monster who must lock everyone into jail before time runs out, or as a Human who must avoid capture and bail their teammates out of trouble. Invite your friends and family to play this speedy game of cat and mouse - or rather, Monsters and Humans!

games.name: Trivia Tricks
games.short_desc: Trivia Tricks is a quiz game featuring 8-player online where friends play free with Friend Pass! Play competitively against your friends or team up to take on trivia bosses in Co-Op! Pick from a ton of categories including user-created Quiz Packs in Steam Workshop!

games.name: Climber Animals: Together
games.short_desc: Climber Animals is a challenging and dynamic parkour game for 1-8 players. In this game,overcome obstacles and climb to the top with your friends. If you fall, your progress is lost and you start over. Keep your balance on this challenging climb and compete with your friends to reach the top.

games.name: Garbanzo Quest
games.short_desc: GARBANZO QUEST! The crazy bullet-heck platformer where your main weapon is your own spit! Bring a friend! Hand-crafted challenges, secrets, and branching paths galore!

games.name: The Crackpet Show
games.short_desc: The Crackpet Show is an action-packed rogue-lite shoot’em-up about mutated animals that fight in a bizarre TV show, crushing their opponents with a variety of weapons. Choose your beastie, gear ‘em up, and go kill your enemies in the name of fame and sweet sponsorship deals!

games.name: Chaos Express: Delivery Simulator
games.short_desc: Deliver goods with your friends in open-world city. Manage and upgrade your delivery point, acquire new ways of delivery and become the best.

games.name: Shape Shifter: Formations
games.short_desc: Shape Shifter: Formations is an action twin-stick shooter with rogue-lite elements, where you must destroy hordes of geometric enemies alone or with a friend. Select your ship and combine a large variety of weapons, abilities and infinitely stacking upgrades to craft your own unique build.

games.name: Breaking Gates
games.short_desc: Intense 2D action with special attacks, aerial combos, and customizable combat in a vibrant, hand-drawn world. Upgrade your skills, forge new items, discover secret paths, and face challenging enemies on a journey to save the kingdom!

games.name: LiMiT's Escape Room Games
games.short_desc: Try to solve the puzzles of the 2 levels (apartment and office) alone or with your friends to escape from the rooms. Both levels are designed for 1 to 1.5 hours of play each. Can you beat this time?

games.name: Killer in the cabin
games.short_desc: You find yourself among a group of survivors of a bus crash in the Norwegian mountains. Rescue is several days away, so to make it out alive, you and the other players have to cooperate in finding shelter, food and water. But one of you is a killer.

games.name: Trackline Express
games.short_desc: Embark on a thrilling journey through an unforgiving desert. You'll need to gather scarce resources and utilize your strategic and management skills to build a little train capable of overcoming attacks and fires.

games.name: BRELOK -ねずみたちの脱出-
games.short_desc: “BRELOK - The Mice’s Escape -” is a cooperative escape game exclusively for two players. Play together with your family, friends, or your significant other.

games.name: Backroom Company
games.short_desc: Backroom Company (aka Async Corporation) is a mysterious group exploring “Noclip.” No one knows who created it. Follow the missing explorers' traces and find strange items deep in the Backrooms.

games.name: Torque Drift 2
games.short_desc: From the vibrant streets of Tokyo to high-stakes professional competitions backed by global brands, Torque Drift 2 invokes all aspects of drift and street culture to offer an experience as diverse and dynamic as the motorsport itself.

games.name: PAW Patrol Mighty Pups Save Adventure Bay
games.short_desc: Join the Mighty Pups on a super-heroic mission to Save Adventure Bay. Have fun together in 2-player co-op mode, unlock fun mini-games, rescue familiar friends and use each pup’s mighty powers to make the town PAWsome again!

games.name: VOLTED
games.short_desc: Tanks, flying cars, giant bugs, lots of guns, bullet rain - it's INSANE! PS: don't forget to take your friends with you.

games.name: Slopecrashers
games.short_desc: Slopecrashers is an arcade snowboard racer starring a wild crew of animals on a globe-trotting quest to become champions - but someone’s out to ruin their plans! Race solo or with friends, pull off stylish tricks, and use wild power-ups to take down rivals in chaotic, fast-paced action.

games.name: Ancient Kingdoms
games.short_desc: Dive into an old-school pixel art RPG inspired by classic MMORPGs! Explore epic dungeons, battle fearsome bosses, and complete quests solo offline or online with up to 5 players. Choose your class, gear up, and craft your own legend!

games.name: Golazo! 2
games.short_desc: Dynamic arcade football game with medium-sized fields, no fouls, and offsides whistled. Add street gameplay to this mix to have just pure fun & action!

games.name: Asterogues
games.short_desc: Beat up planets in Asterogues, a cosmic bullet hell shoot-em-up hybrid! Pick your character from a band of outcasts banished to the Asteroid Belt, dodge and shoot your way through a brutal onslaught of bullets, and take revenge against the Solar System!

games.name: Massive
games.short_desc: "Massive" is a stylized feast of frantic and action shooter for 1-4 players.

games.name: Volleyball Fever
games.short_desc: Volleyball Fever is a VR sports game set on a tropical island. Stick your feet in the warm sand and join us on the beach! 🏐🌊🌴😃

games.name: KUUKIYOMI 2: Consider It More! - New Era
games.short_desc: New situations added. A game that determines whether you have the skills to be considerate in this new world.

games.name: Paper Pirates
games.short_desc: Grab a crew and jump aboard a haunted pirate ship for a social deduction party game, using your phones as controllers! Are you a human sailing home to shore or a ghost working against the crew? Throw your crewmates overboard, but fear not - nobody’s ever out of the game!

games.name: AFL Evolution 2
games.short_desc: THE EVOLUTION CONTINUES - AFL Evolution 2 is taking AFL gaming to new heights with more features than ever before!

games.name: Oh Baby Kart
games.short_desc: Kart Racing. Ultimate abilities. Over 100+ Karts. 100+ Challenges. Unique racing modes including Race Royale and Grand Prix Duo.

games.name: Ben 10: Power Trip
games.short_desc: Evil Hex has cursed Europe – and only Ben 10 can stop him! Explore a 3D world filled with combat, puzzles and secrets as you save the day!

games.name: Football Simulator
games.short_desc: Step onto the gridiron with Football Simulator and experience the most dynamic and physics-driven football game ever made. Break through tackles, juggle tipped passes, and dive for interceptions to lead your team to victory. Features a fully moddable environment.

games.name: Hired 2 Die
games.short_desc: A 1-4 player co-op survival horror where the horror begins when the shift starts. Clean, organize, and contain dangerous creatures using CCTV, motion sensors, and more. Earn your paycheck, upgrade your tools, and capture them. New game mode available!

games.name: Frogun Encore
games.short_desc: Frogun ENCORE is a dashing standalone expansion/sequel to indie hit FROGUN! Join now older Renata and Jake in a trek around the whole world to prevent the return of Beelzebub. ENCORE builds on FROGUN's retro PS1/N64 formula. Plus, enjoy the whole adventure in true couch co-op.

games.name: Scourge of War: Waterloo
games.short_desc: Scourge of War: Waterloo follows in the footsteps of its American Civil War predecessors and takes the action to one of the most famous battles in history. It is by far the most detailed game about the final battle of the War of the Seventh Coalition.

games.name: Dooms Hair Salon
games.short_desc: Dooms Hair Salon is a comedy simulation game about running a hair salon in a chaotic town. Survive by operating the salon alone or with friends!

games.name: DragonRoad
games.short_desc: This is an open world game on 3D, Also a mission centered survival battle game. It includes role-playing, tactical strategy, experience upgrade.It has Dozens scenes and combat tasks, allowing players to complete tasks and receive rewards. It support multi people cooperation on network.

games.name: Yugo: the non-game
games.short_desc: Yugo: the non-game is a virtual space where you can drive a car, listen to the radio, and invite people to talk and share the experience with.

games.name: Containment Corp, Inc.
games.short_desc: A co-op horror game where you team up with friends to hunt anomalies and collect rare loot. Customize your loadouts, your looks, and get to work!

games.name: Cowboy 3030
games.short_desc: Step into the Wild West future of Cowboy 3030, a third-person shooter with 3D bullet hell and roguelike elements. Play solo or team up with friends, as various heroes with unique abilities. Take on notorious alien outlaws, forge unique builds in every run and rise to become top gun of 3030!

games.name: Tracery of Fate
games.short_desc: Tracery of Fate is a dark fantasy cooperative/solo VR game in magic post-apocalyptic world.

games.name: Auto Age: Standoff
games.short_desc: In the bright but distant future, the recovery of New America rests in the hands of wheeled warriors. Will you side with the sinister Dark Jaw or intrepid Val Vega? Customize your killer ride and go head to head in 80s-style car combat. Gear up, team up, and roll out!

games.name: NARAKA: BLADEPOINT / 永劫無間 - Test Server
games.short_desc: NARAKA: BLADEPOINT is Battle Royale game designed to provide a brand new experience of melee combat, featuring a boundless movement system, an aim-at-whatever-you-want grappling hook, and a sophisticated combat system involving accessible block & parry mechanics.

games.name: Cats on Duty
games.short_desc: Cats on Duty is a🐱 purr-fect blend of RTS, tower defense, game genres. Manage two game fields, upgrade adorable cat towers, and watch your fluffy warriors bravely defend against foes. 🐾

games.name: Jack Axe
games.short_desc: Be Jack! Get an axe! Take Jack (and her sisters) on an axe tossing, single or multiplayer, platforming adventure in a vibrant open world inspired by Filipino and Norse mythology.

games.name: Trainz Plus
games.short_desc: Drive, Explore, Operate and Create the railroad of your dreams - and now collaborate in real time with Multiplayer Surveyor! And with Trainz Plus memberships, you get more content, more features and the latest Trainz has to offer!

games.name: Colossus Down
games.short_desc: Join forces with Nika, MechaNika, Agatha and the Great Bleeding Pig in this peculiar and crazy mission of destruction of everything that isn't cool.

games.name: Goons: Legends & Mayhem
games.short_desc: A frantic blend of beat 'em up and arcade hockey that plays out over various themed levels with opposing teams of heroes outfitted with unique abilities. Insane sports action like you've never seen before!

games.name: Breakout: Recharged
games.short_desc: The original brick breaker returns with its toughest challenge yet. Survive as long as you can in arcade or take on one of 50 challenges picking up game-changing power-ups along the way.

games.name: Suika Shapes
games.short_desc: Strategically match an insane number of shapes and make a watermelon without running out of space in ​this new hit action puzzle game! Featuring intense versus modes, and relaxing co-operative modes, play online or offline however you'd like!

games.name: EndCycle VS
games.short_desc: EndCycle VS is a grid-battle adventure that challenges you to create the ultimate deck. Battle against the oncoming Noise or prove yourself in epic online battles - now with ROLLBACK NETCODE!

games.name: Inexistence Rebirth
games.short_desc: Rediscover this great Metroidvania game in a brand new version with a lot of features and improvements! Run in a vast world full of mysteries and action in this Metroidvania-style game inspired by the classics of the 16-bit era.

games.name: Ready, Steady, Ship!
games.short_desc: Grab a buddy for this chaotic couch co-op delight. Use various tools and equipment to assemble the most efficient conveyor belts to keep the goods flowing! Best played in 2-player couch coop.

games.name: My Little Pony: A Zephyr Heights Mystery
games.short_desc: Take friendship to new heights and tame the chaotic magic that’s turning the world upside down, in a mystery adventure for one or two ponies!

games.name: 大逃亡专家 Escape Expert
games.short_desc: This is an open world escape Indie Game, you are an escape expert helping clients to escape. Work is not always simple, you may become city wanted, police will block all exit ways, you need to prepare enough food, fuel, energy, tools, etc to survive during these wanted days.

games.name: Riverbond
games.short_desc: Riverbond is a ‘shoot-and-slash’ dungeon crawler with solo and couch co-op play, set in a stunning voxel world.

games.name: Exploding Kittens® 2
games.short_desc: Download Exploding Kittens® 2 and live your best and most chaotic kitty life! Take a deep whiff of burning furballs, draw a card and pray for victory (and look stylish all the while, thanks to oodles of customisation options for your own adorable avatar).

games.name: Calturin and Clone
games.short_desc: Calturin and Clone is a 2D co-op action RPG where you can either play as a lone adventurer or with a fellow wizard. Mainly focused on difficult boss fights and other challenging encounters that are not combat, Calturin and Clone will test you and your friend's skills to the limit.

games.name: Potion Party
games.short_desc: Potion Party is a funny couch co-op alchemy game for one to four players. Working as a team, you and your friends must manage your own alchemy shop. Earn money, upgrade your tools, decorate the shop and become a master alchemist!

games.name: Fallen Angel
games.short_desc: Tossed aside and cast out. It's time to claim your birthright. Rise as Lucifer and battle the armies of the afterlife and ascend through the weird and warped realms of heaven and claim vengeance.

games.name: Liberte
games.short_desc: Liberté is a deck-builder roguelite inspired by the French Revolution and body horror. Brave the war-torn streets as Rene - a regular Parisian entangled in a civil war caused by a cryptic invader from another dimension, Lady Bliss. Collect cards, nurture alliances, and try to stay alive!

games.name: Jelly Express
games.short_desc: Welcome to Jelly Express - the physics-based co-op game that's as cute as it is fun! Transform into wibbly-wobbly jellies, tackle all obstacles to get those packages delivered! Do it alone, or have a partner to help you out! Stretch, jump and wiggle your way to victory.

games.name: Never BreakUp Beta
games.short_desc: This is Free Beta version of Never BreakUp - A joyful party game allows you to play alone or with friends. To help or trap each other,All depend on you ! No matter you win or loose, Never BreakUp!

games.name: Concept Destruction
games.short_desc: Concept Destruction is a demolition derby sandbox with miniature cars made of cardboard. Crash them into each other to earn points by destroying other vehicles. Pick a car model and crash other concept cars to begin mass production!

games.name: DIG - Deep In Galaxies
games.short_desc: Free the galaxies in this action platformer! Jump, swing, dig and shoot your way through uncharted planets. Give hell to the Overlord's forces and face alien foes. Earn rewards after every battle and add them to your ever-growing arsenal.

games.name: River Tails: Stronger Together
games.short_desc: River Tails: Stronger Together is a 3D co-op adventure platformer designed around an asymmetrical co-op system. Teammates must work together to defeat end-of-level bosses and solve puzzles across a range of natural-world environments. All you need is communication, coordination and complete trust!

games.name: Hellstuck: Rage With Your Friends
games.short_desc: Get ready to rage with your friends in this co-op precise platforming adventure! You're stuck in Hell. You can only jump upwards and all you have to do is escape … it can't be that hard, right?!

games.name: Outside The Grid
games.short_desc: Imagine that you are in prison. Not everyone can escape from the hands of justice, you need to have an IQ above average. Blow up, destroy, hide, kill, evolve - all this can be done in the game Outside the Grid. But do not forget about Kerbalai, help him finally find peace!

games.name: Tabletop Playground
games.short_desc: The modern digital tabletop game for fans and creators! Featuring deep customization and choice, enjoy more immersive tabletop sessions with friends than ever before. Build new rule sets for traditional games, play custom-made games by the community or create your own and share them with the world.

games.name: Korea Dynasty (조선메타실록)
games.short_desc: This game is a 3D open world survival exploration game that survives in the Korea Dynasty. Players Begin with slaves, change their status in Joseon, survive, and escape. Once free, travel around the country, explore hundreds of ruins, hunt, and collect what you need to survive.

games.name: Hot Shot Burn
games.short_desc: Hot Shot Burn is the hilariously violent party brawler that lets you compete in the galaxy's ultimate televised blood sport. Experience crazy couch battles full of ridiculous flukes and insane skill shots for up to 4 players.

games.name: Mad Streets
games.short_desc: Mad Streets is a hilarious multiplayer party game with an emphasis on brutal yet comical fist fighting throughout a multitude of modes, local and online, where players battle it out in wild physics driven chaos to determine who is the baddest player in town!

games.name: Carly and the Reaperman - Escape from the Underworld
games.short_desc: Join the adventure of Carly and the Reaperman in the Underworld! Master platforming to avoid dangers, solve puzzles and build your way to through dozens of fun and challenging obstacles to the finish line - play alone or with a friend!

games.name: Messy Up
games.short_desc: "Messy UP" is a cute multiplayer game where pets destroy homes to grab the owner's attention. Due to the owner's busy schedule, they lack time for their pets. Players control the pets or play as the owner to catch them in this delightful mischief-filled game!

games.name: Wally and the FANTASTIC PREDATORS
games.short_desc: Your best friend wants to cheer you up, so he tries his best to make a dungeon for you to explore. Explore his wholesome, weird-as-heck, scrappy rogue-lite oozing with charm and humor for 1-2 Players.

games.name: Mad Experiments: Escape Room
games.short_desc: Award-nominated escape game. Alone or with up to 5 players, explore 3 unique rooms, solve mind-bending puzzles, and unravel the dark secrets of the Professor Cheshire and his experiments.

games.name: MannaRites
games.short_desc: Fantasy beat'em'up with a bit of RPG flavor and couch co-op. Explore open map, fight brutal enemies, find and equip weapons, armor and artifacts, make your hero stronger by gaining experience and learning unique perks and combat moves!

games.name: CounterAttack: Uprising
games.short_desc: CounterAttack: Uprising is a side scrolling space shooter (shmup). Team up or fight solo, 1 - 4 player local or up to 8 players online coop, unlock upgrades, use powerful ultimate abilities, enhance your ship the way you want, and save the Earth from annihilation.

games.name: Mobmania
games.short_desc: Mobmania is a four (4) player co-op real-time bullet-hell action rogue-like where you kill enemies, buy items after leveling up, and survive long enough against thousands of monsters and bosses until the final fight against the Witch.

games.name: Hellsweeper VR
games.short_desc: DARE TO DESCEND INTO HELL? Hellsweeper VR is an intense first-person action-combat VR experience. Traverse the underworld where every step brings a challenge or a chance. Gain mastery of your weapons and elemental magic, or fall to the unrelenting onslaught of hell's twisted souls.

games.name: Mutant Ops
games.short_desc: Mutant Ops is a low poly co-op shooter. Go in alone or with friends and survive endless waves of mutants and monsters.

games.name: Struggling
games.short_desc: Struggling is a physics-based co-op platformer with a twisted spin on teamwork. Control the arms of a squishy abomination and lead it through a deranged world.

games.name: Janosik
games.short_desc: Challenging retro pixel graphics action-platformer. Become a legendary rogue Janosik and explore the big mountain castle level full of secrets. Available for FREE!

games.name: Feather
games.short_desc: Feather is a multiplayer game about exploration, relaxation and immersion. Transform yourself into a bird, take flight, and enjoy a zen-like, picturesque landscape on your own terms. Swoop, glide, and backflip your way around mysterious locations to uncover hidden paths that only birds can follow!

games.name: Tree Simulator 2023
games.short_desc: It's exactly what it sounds like! Have you ever wanted to be a tree? Do you like odd numbers? How about multiplayer, weather, seasons and more!? Well then this is the game for you! Come on down to a place where you will never want to leaf. Relax and be the best tree you can be. 1-250 players.

games.name: Skillshot City
games.short_desc: Loot, shoot, cast and drive in this chaotic PvP Roguelite. Level up fast, draft wild skills, and create crazy combos on the fly. Explore a GTA-style battle royale with no queues or downtime as you prepare to win the final fight!

games.name: Cassette Beasts
games.short_desc: Collect awesome monsters to use during turn-based battles in this open-world RPG, now with online multiplayer mode. Combine any two monster forms using Cassette Beasts’ Fusion System to create unique and powerful new ones!

games.name: Sandwich Simulator
games.short_desc: Ready to create your own world of flavor? Play solo or co-op with up to 8 players, prepare sandwiches with your friends, deliver online orders to the courier and run your sandwich restaurant. Clean, expand, and keep your customers happy!

games.name: Oppidum
games.short_desc: Enjoy Oppidum, a story-driven survival experience for 1-4 players full of adventure, action, crafting, exploration… Everything a squad of scouts would love for a good story to tell. Do you accept the challenge?

games.name: Elements Divided
games.short_desc: Become a peak elemental warrior. Command the battlefield with instinctive, gesture-based controls and hurl yourself across arenas. Unleash devastating elemental combos in frantic brawls with up to 8 players. Now with Sub-Elements, brand new Techniques, new Maps and tons of new Cosmetics!

games.name: D.O.T. Defence
games.short_desc: Welcome to the frontlines! Build towers, muster armies, and conquer the map. Challenge yourself in the single-player campaign following the Chroma Wars, survive relentless waves in solo defense, or battle it out in local matches against friends and AI bots. Victory comes with the last HQ standing!

games.name: LIBRITOPIA: Librarian Simulator
games.short_desc: Manage your own library! Organize and classify books however you like, furnish the space with shelves, help visitors find their books, and maintain silence to keep them happy!

games.name: Phantom Breaker: Battle Grounds Ultimate
games.short_desc: "Phantom Breaker: Battle Grounds Ultimate" is a side-scrolling beat-'em-up with the heart of a fighting game, showcasing nostalgic pixel art and the latest cross-platform online multiplayer. Experience the biggest and most expansive entry in the "Phantom Breaker: Battle Grounds" series to date!

games.name: Virtual Hunter
games.short_desc: Virtual Hunter brings realistic hunting to virtual reality. Pack your gear and put your hunting skills and tactics to the test in the open wilderness.

games.name: Hydroponics Farm & Store Simulator
games.short_desc: Transform your passion into profit with hydroponics! Design, build, and manage your own sustainable farming and business system. Experiment with different plants and fish, customize your setup, supply the market needs, and harvest your success. Dive into the future of farming today!

games.name: PARANOIA PLACE
games.short_desc: PARANOIA PLACE is a 1-3 player online co-op survival horror game. Together or alone, you will need to solve puzzles, find items and run from the bloodthirsty demonic killer.

games.name: Jurassic Park Classic Games Collection
games.short_desc: HOLD ON TO YOUR BUTTS! THE 8-AND 16-BIT ERA OF JURASSIC PARK GAMES HAS RETURNED, COMMEMORATING 30 YEARS OF THE ICONIC FILM!

games.name: Dragon Simulator Multiplayer
games.short_desc: Welcome to the World of Dragons. Dragon Simulator Multiplayer is a 3D simulator game in which you fight in PVP battles against other dragons or finish off AI characters that shoot from the ground.

games.name: Aeon Drive
games.short_desc: Rush through the cyberpunk landscapes of Neo Barcelona in Aeon Drive, an action-platformer with a speedrunning twist! Whether solo or in up to 4 player co-op, sprint and dash through many areas of the neon-infused city - and use your time and space-bending abilities to get ahead.

games.name: International Space Banana
games.short_desc: SPIN. BOUNCE. STRUGGLE... In Space, nobody can hear you rage.

games.name: RagingBlasters
games.short_desc: Raging Blasters is a vertical scroll shmup featuring high speed scrolling and the exhilaration of destruction.

games.name: Werewolf Party
games.short_desc: A medieval mystery, 4 to 12 players, where villagers scheme and werewolves hunt. Sharpen your wits, trust no one, and see who makes it through the night.

games.name: Space Food Truck
games.short_desc: Space Food Truck is a cooperative, culinary scifi adventure. 1-4 players take on unique roles aboard the Galaxy Gourmet. Their mission: explore a vast, procedurally-generated galaxy in search of exotic ingredients, craft delicious recipes, and withstand the untold dangers of deep space.

games.name: Fighties
games.short_desc: Fighties is a fast paced 2D platform fighter. Choose from a wide selection of Fighties each with their own unique play style. Beat down your opponents to become the strongest Fightie of them all.

games.name: FINAL SPIN
games.short_desc: A 2-4 player online party game about risking your life for the thrill of high-stakes gambling. Use your items wisely to gain an edge over chance and play until you are the last person standing.

games.name: 1993 Space Machine
games.short_desc: Space shooters never die. 1993 is a testament to that. 1993 is a classic shoot em up celebrating games like Gradius, R-Type and Life Force.

games.name: City Climber
games.short_desc: City Climber is a silly physics-based game about a floppy ragdoll climber, who has to save the world. Find your way through diverse hand-crafted environments and enjoy funny challenges full of falling and destruction.

games.name: Ikonei Island: An Earthlock Adventure
games.short_desc: Ikonei Island is yours to discover! Explore and gather resources. Farm the land, craft tools and gear, and build your base or a cozy home. Befriend magical creatures and fight monsters with your friends or solo!

games.name: Stowaway
games.short_desc: An 10 player online social deduction game inspired by games like Among Us & Town of Salem, where the stowaway is tasked with killing the crew before they reach land!

games.name: Knights And Bikes
games.short_desc: Saddle up for a bike-riding, frisbee-throwing, goose-petting, friendship-building, treasure-hunting, story-driven adventure for 1 or 2 players!

games.name: WHO'S WHO 2.0
games.short_desc: Who's Who 2.0 is back with brand new team! Looking for another dynamic party game? Each characters now holds unique skills which now will impact each modes with its own advantages! You can play solo, or party up with your friends and become the winner by eliminating the real players among the NPCs.

games.name: Abnormality
games.short_desc: Explore abandoned locations, collect paranormal evidence, and survive the wrath of the former residents still haunting them. Team up with up to 3 friends to investigate by day, and hide for your life by night. What begins as an investigation quickly turns into a desperate struggle to stay alive.

games.name: Shop Simulator: Supermarket
games.short_desc: DESIGN, SELL & EXPAND – YOUR SUCCESS IS IN YOUR HANDS. Put your entrepreneurial skills to the test in Shop Simulator: Supermarket. Immerse yourself in the world of retail and start your own business today!

games.name: Galactic Getaway: Build a Home for Pets
games.short_desc: Attract adorable creatures to your cosy home in this life sim, where what you build shapes who arrives and who stays. Decorate, farm and fish — solo or with friends — as you craft a life in the stars that your new companions will come to love.

games.name: Chained in the Backrooms
games.short_desc: Chained in the Backrooms is a 1-4 player co-op, mission-based horror game. Trapped in a blurry subconscious and chained together, toy bears must solve puzzles, complete challenging missions, and survive against creatures trying to destroy them.

games.name: Bloody Trapland
games.short_desc: Bloody Trapland is a fast-paced multiplayer platformer where the levels are filled with dozens of dangerous traps and tricky jumps that stand in your way! Play co-op with your friends or take on the challenges on your own. With support for up to 4 players at once, local and/or online.

games.name: Real VR Fishing
games.short_desc: 🎣 Dive into the Ultimate Real VR Fishing Experience! Explore stunningly realistic environments with Real VR Fishing. Relax in 40 beautiful maps and expand your adventure with DLC packs, unlocking 95 fishing locations. Discover 150+ fish species in the base game and over 300 species with DLC.

games.name: Brave Escape
games.short_desc: Embark on a thrilling co-op adventure in 'Brave Escape,' a challenging platformer demanding teamwork to conquer perilous traps and treacherous terrain.

games.name: Monster Meals
games.short_desc: Monster Meals is a fast-paced cooking game where you and a friend control monster chefs in a food truck, preparing meals with exotic creatures for monstrous customers. Play solo, local co-op, or online co-op—but serve quickly, or you’ll be on the menu!

games.name: BattleCap
games.short_desc: Dive into an exhilarating maritime battle for 1 to 4 players! Assemble warships with a variety of bottle caps, allowing the warships to transform and break, experiencing flexible physics that brings a refreshing maritime battle! Fight monsters together, or engage in a battle with your friends.

games.name: Superior: Vengeance
games.short_desc: Make your way through a sprawling, hyper-stylized superhero universe on the hunt for superheroes turned evil. Save the world in this roguelite, 3rd-person co-op shooter by stealing powers and engaging in extraordinary combat using hundreds of unique superpowers, weapons, and abilities.

games.name: Escape Memoirs: Safe House
games.short_desc: "Escape Memoirs: Safe House" is a co-operative reverse escape-room puzzle game. You are a member of a criminal organization who must break into one of their own safe houses to fetch some important tools. Do you think you have what it takes to overcome the puzzles that stand in your way?

games.name: Gregory Horror Show: Soul of Roses
games.short_desc: Soul of Roses is a 2D rogue light action game. Absorb the abilities of your enemies, fight, die, revive, and repeat to advance the story.

games.name: OPERATION SERPENS
games.short_desc: Arcade Shooter | Single user campaign | Co-op multiplayer mode | Fast paced action game

games.name: Jetman Go
games.short_desc: Engage in multiplayer gunfights that you are free to fly in the sky play like no FPS you've played before. you can choose 4 guns with a totally level playing field and 18 beautiful maps with different strategies. Equip your jetpack and Fight in the sky!

games.name: Zero-based World-从零开始
games.short_desc: Zero Based World is a multiplayer sandbox survival game.

games.name: CYBERHUNK
games.short_desc: Collect crazy power-ups, upgrade your weapons into tools of destruction, and escape from the robotic zombie horde - alone, or with friends.

games.name: Circle of Football (Soccer or Whatever)
games.short_desc: It's not the usual soccer game, it's a fast-paced football game with hilarious fields, easy-to-learn controls and hard-to-master gameplay. Have fun with your friends and compete in online multiplayer matches! Kick, tackle your opponents and score GOOOOALS to climb the leaderboards!
